description.en: Basic features such as grammar and spelling check, plagiarism detection, and writing suggestions.
description.zh: 基本功能，如语法和拼写检查、抄袭检测和写作建议。

description.en: All features of the free version plus advanced grammar and writing suggestions, and priority support.
description.zh: 免费版的所有功能，加上高级语法和写作建议，以及优先支持。

weaknesses.en: Limited to web and mobile apps, no standalone desktop application.
weaknesses.zh: 仅限于网页和移动应用程序，没有独立的桌面应用程序。

weaknesses.en: Premium features are not available for all languages.
weaknesses.zh: 高级功能并非所有语言都可用。

targetAudience.en: Students, writers, and professionals who need to improve their writing and avoid errors.
targetAudience.zh: 需要提高写作水平和避免错误的学生、作家和专业人士。

positioning.en: Grammarly positions itself as a comprehensive writing assistant that helps users improve their writing skills and avoid common mistakes.
positioning.zh: Grammarly把自己定位为一个全面的写作助手，帮助用户提高写作技能并避免常见错误。
